title: Paw Patrol Chase RC Action Cruiser, Remote Control Car with LED Lights and Easy-Steer Controller, Pretend Play Kids Toys for Boys and Girls Ages 3 and Up
features: Turbo-Charged Fun: Experience action-packed adventures with the 25,4 cm Chase's RC Action Cruiser, featuring lights, and easy-steer controls for little hands to use
Thrilling Features: Drive forward or make sharp turns with the press of a button on the remote controller, plus enjoy Chase's swivelling head and blinking red LED lights
Imaginative Play: With PAW Patrol's genuine styling, these learning toys for kids inspire creativity and heroism, offering the excitement of the show for toddlers and kids alike

PAWsome Gifts for Kids: When buying toys for ages 2-4, PAW nursery toys & toddler toys are toys for girls and boys who love toy cars and plushies, as alternatives to dolls, dinosaur toys or a train set
Collect Them All: Expand your collection of PAW Patrol toys for kids with Rescue Wheels toy trucks, PAW Patrol film toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)
